payload.summary: Conductor run pour-c2 started: stream C2 (physical telemetry collector) dispatched to cc-builder-1 and cc-builder-2; cc-builder-4 requested via CCMETA allow-list but absent from the ready set (exclude_from_build_pool removes it before the allow-list applies); assay cc-builder-3 (isolation=direct, claudefarm1 down). Timestamp from first checkpoint 792906ab.

pour-c2 complete: assay graded BOTH laps identical B/70 (behavior mode; cc-builder-1 162/162 after agent timeout with collector-only commit; cc-builder-2 171/171 with complete deliverables but core-contract defects); debiased tiebreak detected POSITION BIAS, no consensus, fell back to list order crowning cc-builder-1; conductor promoted its lap to mirror main (97d2388). Curator review rejected both laps; landed synthesis c40ee1e (cc-builder-1 collector + cc-builder-2-derived tests/notes). Timestamp from final checkpoint 9974b3b9.
